findings.description: Health page uses repeated `(event as { reason?: string })` type assertions instead of defining a proper type for events — fragile and hides type errors
Magic numbers for latency thresholds (200, 600, 2000ms) and sync staleness (600_000ms) should be named constants
AnomalyTimeline uses MOCK_ANOMALIES directly with no TODO/plan to switch to real data — mock data in production component
No E2E tests for new dashboard panels (Health Matrix, Resource Gauges, Anomaly Timeline) or health page overhaul
SVG gauge strokeDasharray uses magic number 2.51 (circumference/100) without explanatory constant or comment
UptimeBars only has single data point per cluster (current status) — uptime bars will show 23 empty slots and 1 filled, misleading UX
animate-pulse-slow class used on health dots but may not be defined in tailwind config
